instruction: 查看 iPhone 16 Pro Max 的价格
agent_inference:
Plan: 1. Open the "京东" app. 2. Use the search function to enter the name of the digital product you are interested in. 3. Review the search results to find the price information for the product.
Thought: To check the prices of digital products, we can use online shopping apps available on the phone. The apps "京东" (JD) and "拼多多" (Pinduoduo) are popular e-commerce platforms in China that can be used to search for digital products and view their prices. The plan involves opening one of these apps, searching for the desired digital product, and reviewing the price information.
